alkylation reagent: adding 10 mM of iodoacetamide for 30 min in the dark.
alkylation concentration: adding 10 mM of iodoacetamide for 30 min in the dark.
cleavage agent: samples were digested with 0.4 μg trypsine/LysC (Promega) overnight.
fragmentation method: ions from each full scan were higher-energy C-trap dissociation (HCD) fragmented.
instrument: coupled to an Orbitrap Fusion Tribrid mass spectrometer.
reduction reagent: samples were reduced in 5 mM dithiothreitol, pH 8.
reduction concentration: samples were reduced in 5 mM dithiothreitol, pH 8.
